label: Score matching & denoising score objectives

node.label: Score matching & denoising score objectives
node.definition: The model learns gradients of log density, often from noise-corrupted data.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Score matching & denoising score objectives is modeled as depending on Generative modeling, Probability theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption, Diffusion & score-based models.

limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Probability theory.
